title: DBT Sponsored Biofest
content: DBT Sponsored Biofest Biorhythm and Scientific Poster Competition 11th Feb. 2014 Department of Bioinformatics, GGDSD College, Chandigarh organized a Science Fest (Biorhythm) and Scientific Poster competition under the aegis of Department of Biotechnology (DBT), Ministry of Science and Technology, Govt. of India on 11th February 2014 in their campus. A team of 30 members from Synapse (Student’s Club, Dept. of Biotechnology and Bioinformatics, JUIT) represented Jaypee University of Information Technology, Himachal Pradesh in various science and social issue based competitions organized in the festival. JUITian’s gave a fabulous performance in all the events they participated and won hearts of the audience. “ Nati ” under the Folk dance competition and “ Nukar Natak ” under the social issue based skit competition, got a special referral from the eminent guest Padam Shri Awardee Neelam Mansingh Chowdhry and won first prize in their respective categories. Following are the prizes won by JUITian’s in the competition: FOLK DANCE 1st Prize – (Nati Group) Sachi (4th Yr. BT), Arun (3rd Yr. BI), Surabhi, Shadali, Shubham (2nd Yr.BT), Sheena (2nd Yr. BI), Ankit, Gaurav (1st Yr. BT) DIDDLE FIDDLE 1st Prize – Vasu (2nd Yr. BT), Priya, Brinda, Shreya, Gorky (1st Yr. BT) FACE PAINTING 1st Prize – Divya (1st Yr. BT) and Sahil (3rd Yr. BI) STILL PHOTOGRAPHY 1st Prize – Nicholas (4th Yr. BT – UNO) JHOOM BARABAR JHOOM 2nd Prize – Vasu (2nd Yr. BT), Priya, Brinda, Gorky (1st Yr. BT) SCIENTIFIC POSTER (UG Category) 2nd Prize – Pranita and Kanika (4th Yr. BT) SCIENTIFIC POSTER (PG Category) 2nd Prize – Rajinder (2nd Yr. MTech CB) and Vikaran (3rd Yr. BI) JAM 3rd Prize – Aditya (2nd Yr. BT) SCIENCE QUIZ 3rd Prize – Brandon (4th Yr. BI – UNO) and Sumant (2nd Yr. BT) POSTER MAKING 3rd Prize – Vinod (3rd Yr. BI) Heartiest congratulations to all the winners!!! GLIMPSES OF THE EVENT
